title: Seua jone phan seua
original_title: เสือ โจรพันธุ์เสือ
overview: In 1946, just after World War 2, bandits rule the countryside of Siam. The notorious Bai rises to become the king of bandits and police chief Yodying has been ordered to apprehend Bai dead or alive.
